evidence: drsam-99657.bubble — APIEvent bTIEN (api/bTIES) actions bTIEm through bTIFD: seven-action ChangeThing chain with set_list (0–5) and add simplifier (6)

functional_audit.check: resolveAiCoachingModes mirrors bTIEN seven-action sequential chain: default stabilizer; alignment<3.2→rebuilder; stability<3.2→stabilizer; performance<3.2→simplifier; all≥3.8→strategist; recovery/grief→protector; high cognitive load appends simplifier (bTIFD add, no duplicate)
evidence: drsam-99657.bubble — APIEvent bTIEN actions 0–6 independently verified; no pressure-profile or classification-matrix branches present

functional_audit.check: calculateUserAiCoachingMode loads pillar scores and health/load signals from profile row, resolves mode list, patches ai_coaching_mode_list_list_option_ai_coaching_mode_os on profiles.onboarding_data
runOnboardingProfilePipeline final step invokes calculateUserAiCoachingMode after fingerprint; DASH-02 greeting card reads preferred mode from patched list without re-running calculator

critiques.finding: calculateUserAiCoachingMode also patches ai_coaching_mode_os (last list entry) alongside the list field; bTIEN ChangeThing actions only mutate ai_coaching_mode_list_list_option_ai_coaching_mode_os.
critiques.alternative: Rely solely on readPreferredCoachingMode (last list entry) for DASH-02 display, or document the singular field as a prototype convenience mapping in profileFieldPatch.

critiques.finding: Unit tests exhaustively cover resolveAiCoachingModes (11 cases, all pass) but calculateUserAiCoachingMode has no test for field extraction from onboarding_data/results or patchOnboardingAndResults payload.
critiques.alternative: Add calculateUserAiCoachingMode.test.ts with mocked loadProfileRow/patchOnboardingAndResults verifying score reads, health-flag resolution, and list patch.

critiques.finding: Decompose ir_refs cite bTIEN while Bubble stores the API event under api key bTIES (entity id bTIEN); grep-by-id works but key mismatch can confuse implementers.
critiques.alternative: Note in decompose that bTIEN entity id lives at api/bTIES in drsam-99657.bubble.
